pokemon:ogerpon.name: Ogerpon
pokemon:ogerpon.summary: This Pokémon's type changes based on which mask it's wearing. It confounds its enemies with nimble movements and kicks.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This Pokémon's type changes based on which mask it's wearing. It confounds its enemies with nimble movements and kicks.
This mischief-loving Pokémon is full of curiosity. It battles by drawing out the type-based energy contained within its masks.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This Pokémon's type changes based on which mask it's wearing. It confounds its enemies with nimble movements and kicks.
